# LSQ data sync

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: July 22, 2024 3:11 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:14 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani

# **What problem are we solving?**

- LSQ lead stage is not synced with the DB status, as we introduced new application step in loan application journey.
- Push PF, ROI, Platform and sanction limit on LSQ to enable RMs to assist customer on call.
- Update customer details on LSQ when customer details gets changed using admin action.
- Show LSQ lead owner details on the service dashboard.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview

### 1. Missing Activity which we need to send on LSQ

| **DB Stages** | **Activity name on LSQ** | **Code** | **Trigger** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| CIBIL_CHECK | CIBIL Check | 259 | When user reach at cibil check step |
| CO_BORROWER_KYC | Co-borrower KYC | 260 | When current step of user are co borrower pan details |
| CREDIT_APPROVAL | Credit Approval | 261 | When current step of user are credit approval |
| SIGN_DESK_ESING | Sign desk e-sign | 262 | when current step of the user are sign desk e-sign |
| DOCUMENTS | Documents | 263 | when current step of the user are document |

### 2. Send PF, ROI, Lender, Platform and sanction limit on LSQ

- We need to push loan commercials for a loan application on the LSQ to enable RMs to check loan details on LSQ when they assist customer on call.
- We need to push PF, ROI, Platform and sanction limit against the opportunity.
- LSQ Update opportunity API:

| **Journey** | **Action items** | **Attributes to push** | LSQ Scema code |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| New application | Call Update opportunity API when user fetch with RTA and if lead already exists | Platform | Platform: mx_Custom_63 |
| New application | Call Update opportunity API when user click on continue button on Unlock credit limit page and when lender is assigned.

Note: When BRE run to decide lender | PF, ROI, Lender, Platform | Processing fee: mx_Custom_72

ROI: mx_Custom_73

Lender Name: mx_Custom_27 |
| New application | Call Update opportunity API when user accepts the loan offer | Sanction limit | Sanction limit: mx_Custom_74 |
| Admin action | Call update opportunity API when PF override admin action is used  | PF | Processing fee: mx_Custom_72 |
| Admin action | Call update opportunity API when ROI override Admin action is used  | ROI | ROI: mx_Custom_73 |
| Admin action | Call update opportunity API when Lender change admin action is used  | Lender | Lender Name: mx_Custom_27 |
| Increase limit | - Call Update opportunity API when user click on continue button on Unlock credit limit page.
Note: New opportunity for increase limit is created on LSQ for increase limit application | PF, ROI, Lender, Platform | Processing fee: mx_Custom_72

ROI: mx_Custom_73

Lender Name: mx_Custom_27 |
| Increase limit | Call Update opportunity API when user accepts the loan offer | Sanction limit | Sanction limit: mx_Custom_74 |

Update opportunity API Doc:  [https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/update-an-opportunity/#api](https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/update-an-opportunity/#api)

### 3. Push updated customer data to LSQ whenever changes are made through admin actions

| Admin action  | Action item | Process |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Change lender | When ever lender is changed using the Admin action, call Update opportunity API to update lender for the opportunity |  |
| Change name and email | When ever Name or Email is changed using the Admin action, call Update Lead API to update Name and email for the lead |  |
| Change phone | When ever phone is changed using the Admin action, call Merge Lead API to Merge lead with 2 phone number | Process to merge lead: Create lead with Updated phone number → Save lead details in Volt DB → Call Merge lead API to merge new and old lead |
|  |  |  |

 Update lead API Doc: [https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/update-a-lead/#api](https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/update-a-lead/#api) 

Merge lead API doc: [https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/merge-leads/#api](https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/merge-leads/#api)

### 4. We need to display the current lead owner on the service dashboard when RMs or OPS want to see customer owner details in LSQ.

Process: User click on CTA “Get lead owner” on service desk → LSQ API is called to fetch the lead owner details → If owner is fetched successfully → Show lead owner name and email of service desk.

Use Get lead by phone number API to fetch the lead and owner details.

API DOC: [https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/get-lead-by-phone/#api](https://apidocs.leadsquared.com/get-lead-by-phone/#api)

Pending: Design for CTA placement and to show lead owner details
